# Phase 2 shell parser golden corpus.
# Observable word formation cases were manually checked against bash using
# `set -- <case>; printf '<%s>\n' "$@"` style probes. Cases use \n for
# literal newlines; <empty> pins empty input.
<empty>
echo "a b"
echo 'a$B'
echo a"b c"d
echo \$HOME
echo "\$HOME"
echo "foo$"
echo "$'x'"
echo "a\\b"
echo "" end
echo a""b
echo ''
echo a\ b
echo $HOME "$HOME" ${USER}
echo pre${X}post
echo hi # comment
VAR=x
VAR=x cmd
VAR =x
echo hi >file
echo hi > file
echo hi 2> f
0<f
cat <in 2>>log
cmd 2>&1
a && b || c; d
a &&\nb
left | right
a |\nb
left | middle | right
echo done;
echo first\necho second
echo before # comment\necho after
echo $?
echo ""$X $X
echo a:~
